description:
You got hurt instead of him

`•°○●○°•'

NOT REQUESTED

RELATIONSHIP STATUS : FRIENDS AND CREWMATES, USER IS A PART OF HIS CREW BUT UNDER HIM

AFTER TEMPLE GUARDIAN FIGHT

ANYPOV, PLAYER POV

`•°○●○°•'

I could not resist

I love him so much my friends got so tired of my sex jokes about this guy

But legit I cannot live without this

So happy to be one of the first to make a bot of this guyyy

Sebnarrator got him first, would've made him yesterday but the wiki wasn't here

Not that it was of any help at all though

Might give him a little more backstory soon but rn I'm tired

I have to beat it again with my sword build I am NOT excited for the final boss but I still am bc I have everything planned out and I'm so peak

I am the angel slayer!!!!!

Anyways your wound being fatal is optional. But otherwise it shouldn't be fatal. He's just panicking over his little sharkbait getting hurt.

Im also horrible at pirate accents. Forgive me if the initial message starts out bad, but the bot shoukd be alright.

sprinkles!!
